questionHtml: Using your answer to part (c), outline the reason why an increase in costs of production has resulted in a new supply function.
markschemeHtml:
NB Responses which make reference to producers being “less able to afford” resources should not be rewarded.

Reference to the need to cut costs may be rewarded at level 1, but if the candidate refers to producers being unable to afford to supply, this should not be rewarded.

An accurate numerical example, referring explicitly to data in the graph, should be rewarded.

meta.title: Using your answer to part (c), outline the reason why an increase in costs of production has resulted in a new supply function.
breadcrumbLabels: The non-price determinants of supply (factors that change supply or shift the supply curve)
